response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant tools, plus strong architecture and DevOps exposure, but his seniority level (Staff/Senior roles since 2014) vastly exceeds the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language barrier and high on-site expectation create significant mismatch risks.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Overqualified with 10+ years of senior-level experience for junior/mid role
German language proficiency is only basic, conflicting with high on-site needs in Berlin
Career trajectory suggests leadership expectations inconsistent with individual contributor role
